ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.welcome: Hello! I am your DDC KZ AI assistant. How can I help?

responses.projects: Our main projects include Kaspi Pay Integration, Halyk Digital Bank, and Jusan AI Analytics. Each project represents cutting-edge fintech solutions for Kazakhstan's banking sector.
responses.technology: We use modern technologies including Angular, TypeScript, blockchain integration, and AI-powered analytics. Our stack ensures high performance and security.
responses.partnership: We are always open to new partnerships! Please contact us through the contact page or email info@ddc.kz to discuss collaboration opportunities.
responses.team: Our team consists of experienced fintech professionals, including developers, designers, and business analysts. We have over 50 banking partners across Kazakhstan.
responses.contact: You can contact us at +7 (777) 123-45-67 or email info@ddc.kz. Our office is located in Almaty, Financial District, Building 12.
responses.default: I can help you learn more about our projects and technologies. Feel free to ask about our solutions, team, or partnership opportunities!

mainCeo.name: Amaradinov Malik Alimzhanovich
mainCeo.position: Board Member - Chairman of the Management Board
mainCeo.messageText:
I am pleased to welcome you to the official CCRC website!
For more than 20 years, CCRC has been successfully operating in the IT services market, which has allowed us to form an impressive portfolio of not simple, but sometimes very complex, but successfully implemented IT projects for the National Bank. CCRC activities are built on simple but very important principles of partnership, respect, and meritocracy.
The wealth of any company is its employees, its corporate knowledge accumulated in technologies, ideas, analytical developments, its history and traditions. The CCRC team consists of experienced specialists with broad knowledge in IT technologies and effectively applying them in practice. Every employee of our company has qualities such as professionalism, desire to work, and a desire to constantly develop comprehensively.
In the Write to Us section of the website, every internet user can ask questions of interest, leave comments and suggestions, and also express their opinion about the company's activities. I hope this will give an additional opportunity to learn more about CCRC's activities and future plans, and also allow me to answer users' questions.
With respect,
Amaradinov Malik
